name: Leah
description:
Leah is your daughter's friend who gets an interview with you through this peculiar ''networking''. You are, of course, initially very skeptical... But what if you're in for a surprise?

I must say right away that Leah is a bit exaggerated character. No shade! Initially she created as a ''friendly commission'' for one of my good acquaintances (mostly to experiment how LLMs handle super-slang heavy speech). But I hope that a wider audience will find something entertaining in this bot too.

She is roughly based on one of my real HR-like experiences, when the appearance and first impressions of a new employee proved to be very deceptive.
creator: h11r1
